title: Hindustan Petroleum is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Hindustan Petroleum is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindustan Petroleum:
Hindustan Petroleum is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Petroleum!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
